ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neurons" (
  "neuron_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the neuron */,
  "bee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the bee */,
  "intercept" REAL /* Intercept value from the analysis */,
  "convergence" REAL /* Convergence metric of the neuron */,
  "divergence" REAL /* Divergence metric of the neuron */,
  "slow_velocity" REAL /* Slow velocity measurement */,
  "verg_angle" REAL /* Vergence angle of the neuron */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the neuron recording was made */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the recording was made */,
  "recording_method" TEXT /* Method used for recording */,
  "neuron_type" TEXT /* Type of neuron being recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the neuron recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neuron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neurons_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment is part of */,
  "experiment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in minutes */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* List of equipment used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, assistant) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Areas of research interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "neuron_id" TEXT /* ID of the neuron the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash value for file integrity check */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file content */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version number of the data file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_neuron_id FOREIGN KEY ("neuron_id") REFERENCES neurons ("neuron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_publications" TEXT /* List of publications resulting from the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher started working on the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher ended their involvement in the project */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the researcher's contribution to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "neuron_id" TEXT /* ID of the neuron being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_neuron_id FOREIGN KEY ("neuron_id") REFERENCES neurons ("neuron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user's role assignment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "neuron_id" TEXT /* ID of the neuron being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis performed */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_neuron_id FOREIGN KEY ("neuron_id") REFERENCES neurons ("neuron_id")
)
